arts.ttl: Chelsea, Man Utd, Liverpool and Tottenham FA Cup dates revealed as fourth round TV schedule is announced
arts.sum: Some intriguing ties will take place in the fourth round of the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy concerns me - Man Utd icon looks set to take Leicester down
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has seen Leicester fall to six successive defeats in the Premier League, with the Foxes now sitting second bottom of the top-flight table as they battle against the drop

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy details plan to get Leicester back on track after horror run
arts.sum: Leicester City have lost six-in-a-row and an air of resignation has set in amongst fans at the King Power Stadium that last season's Championship winners may be returning to the second tier - but Ruud van Nistelrooy sees it differently

arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all ten of this weekend's games
arts.sum: Aaron Ashley has picked out a score prediction for all 10 Premier League matches taking place on Saturday, Sunday and Monday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Leicester City vs. Fulham injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Leicester City and Fulham.

arts.ttl: Marco Silva spells out difference between Ruud van Nistelrooy and Steve Cooper's Leicester City
arts.sum: Marco Silva is not attaching any significance to the fact Leicester City are on a six-game losing run in the Premier League – and backed their performance in the loss to Crystal Palace. “Of course, on paper the confidence is not the same, but when the whistle comes and the game starts, it's going to be a football match that both teams want to win and for sure they are going to fight harder and harder to get the points they need.

arts.ttl: Leicester City's January transfer plans could be kickstarted by £15m striker transfer
arts.sum: The MLS club have been looking for a marquee striker signing for the upcoming 2025 season in the US, but while they are reported by Mail Sport to have made a £15m offer for Edouard, it doesn’t seem as if he is their first-choice target. If Edouard leaves and City open up a loan slot, it is likely they will target a new centre-back or right-sided winger.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy expects Leicester’s relegation battle to go to the wire
Leicester City player wants prominent role or quick exit – Contact initiated for transfer
arts.sum: Some days ago, there was talk that Leicester City’s move for Parma’s Woyo Coulibaly could help the Italian club move for Foxes’ defender Caleb Okoli. It seems as if the situation is slowly developing. OK Calciomercato have reported on the centre-back’s future at the King Power today, reiterating Parma’s liking for him. The outlet claim The post Leicester City player wants prominent role or quick exit – Contact initiated for transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Willian to Everton, Kelechi Iheanacho to Leeds, Emiliano Buendia to River Plate
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Willian to Everton, Kelechi Iheanacho to Leeds United and Emiliano Buendia to River Plate.
